name: year
description: Reference year of the ATUS interview (diary year).
observations: Partition column. Derived from the first four digits of tucaseid.

name: tucaseid
description: ATUS case identification number; primary key that links all ATUS files. First four digits are the interview year.

name: tuactivity_n
description: Activity line number sequencing the activities reported on the diary day.

name: tuactdur24
description: Duration of activity in minutes (last activity truncated at 4:00 a.m.)

name: tucc5
description: Was at least one of your own household children < 13 in your care during this activity?

name: tucc5b
description: Was at least one of your non-own household children < 13 in your care during this activity?

name: trtcctot_ln
description: Total time spent during activity providing secondary childcare for all children < 13 (in minutes)

name: trtcc_ln
description: Total time spent during activity providing secondary child care for household and own nonhousehold children < 13 (in minutes)

name: trtcoc_ln
description: Total time spent during activity providing secondary child care for nonown, nonhousehold children <13 (in minutes)

name: tustarttim
description: Activity start time

name: tustoptime
description: Activity stop time

name: trcodep
description: Pooled six-digit activity code

name: trtier1p
description: Pooled lexicon tier 1: 1st and 2nd digits of 6-digit activity code

name: trtier2p
description: Pooled lexicon tiers 1 and 2: 1st four digits of 6-digit activity code

name: tucc8
description: Other than household or own non-household children < 13, was there a child 0-12 in your care during this activity?

name: tucumdur
description: Cumulative duration of activity lengths in minutes; last activity not truncated at 4:00am or 1440 minutes (cumulative total of TUACTDUR for each TUCASEID)

name: tucumdur24
description: Cumulative duration of activity lengths in minutes; last activity truncated at 4:00am or 1440 minutes (cumulative total of TUACTDUR24 for each TUCASEID)

name: tuactdur
description: Duration of activity in minutes (last activity not truncated at 4:00 a.m.)

name: tr_03cc57
description: Was a household or own non-household child < 13 in your care during this activity?

name: trto_ln
description: Total time spent during activity providing secondary childcare for own children < 13 (in minutes)

name: trtonhh_ln
description: Total time spent during activity providing secondary childcare for own nonhousehold children < 13 (in minutes)

name: trtohh_ln
description: Total time spent during activity providing secondary childcare for own household children < 13 (in minutes)

name: trthh_ln
description: Total time spent during activity providing secondary childcare for household children < 13 (in minutes)

name: trtnohh_ln
description: Total time spent during activity providing secondary childcare for nonown household children < 13 (in minutes)

name: tewhere
description: Location or mode of transportation where the activity took place.

name: tucc7
description: Was at least one of your own non-household children < 13 in your care during this activity?

name: trwbelig
description: Flag indicating whether the case was eligible for the Well-Being Module.

name: trtec_ln
description: Time (in minutes) spent providing eldercare by activity

name: tuec24
description: At which times or during which activities did you provide that care or assistance yesterday?

name: tudurstop
description: Method for reporting activity duration
